Defines the built-in properties and identifiers for ReferenceError.prototype in JerryScript.

# Purpose
This code is a C header file that defines the properties and identifiers for the `ReferenceError.prototype` object in a JavaScript engine. It uses macros to declare the object identifier and its properties, which include the constructor, name, and message attributes. The `OBJECT_ID` macro assigns an identifier to the `ReferenceError.prototype`, while the `OBJECT_VALUE` and `STRING_VALUE` macros define the properties of the object, such as `constructor`, `name`, and `message`, with their respective attributes. The file concludes by undefining the macros to prevent conflicts with other parts of the codebase.
